name: Better Than Sex Cake #1
recipeIngredient: 1 package Yellow cake mix with pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cake mix according to directions, using milk instead of water.
2. Bake in a 13x9 inch pan.
3. When done, punch holes into it with a fork.
4. Heat pineapple and sugar until just to a boil; pour over hot cake.
5. Let cool completely.
6. Mix cream cheese with a mixer until smooth. Slowly add the 2 cups milk and pudding; spread on cake and refrigerate until pudding is set.
7. Cover cake completely with sliced bananas.
8. Cover bananas with a layer of Cool Whip.
9. Sprinkle with cherries, pecans, and coconut.
10. Refrigerate several hours before serving.
